author: mss051
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Merges linked notes into a single document, keeping them perfectly synced and formatted.

manifest.author: mss051
manifest.description: Merges linked notes into a single document, keeping them perfectly synced and formatted.
manifest.name: SimpleMerge

name: SimpleMerge

releases.author: mss051
releases.description:
#### Release 1.0.0 - Initial Release

This is the first official release of SimpleMerge. The plugin allows the compilation of multiple linked notes into a single cohesive document, optimizing the workflow for long-form writing.

#### Key Features
* **Full Document Merge**: compiles an entire index note containing links into a single document.
* **Partial Merge**: merges only the specific links present within a text selection.
* **Live Sync Mode**: updates previously merged documents automatically when the original source notes or index files are modified.
* **Custom Separators**: provides the ability to separate merged notes using predefined options like empty spaces and page breaks, or custom Markdown/HTML inputs.

#### Installation
* Download the **main.js** and **manifest.json** files attached to this release.
* Place both files inside a new folder named `simple-merge` within the `.obsidian/plugins/` directory of your vault.
* Reload the plugins list in Obsidian and enable SimpleMerge.
releases.name: Release 1.0.0
